sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Compulsory part (4 topics, ~200 hours) and elective part (4 topics choose 2, ~50 hours); total 250 hours.

sections_extracted.section: Compulsory Part I: Cells and Molecules
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Life molecules, cell organisation, membrane transport, cell cycle/division, cell energetics (photosynthesis and respiration).

sections_extracted.section: Compulsory Part II: Heredity and Evolution
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Mendelian genetics, molecular genetics (DNA, protein synthesis, mutations, biotech), biodiversity and evolution.

sections_extracted.section: Compulsory Part III: Organisms and Environment
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Plant and animal life processes, reproduction/growth/development, coordination/response, homeostasis, ecosystems.

sections_extracted.section: Compulsory Part IV: Health and Disease
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Personal health, disease (infectious/non-infectious), body defence mechanisms and immunity.

sections_extracted.section: Elective Part V: Human Physiology: Regulation and Control
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Osmoregulation, thermoregulation, blood-gas regulation, reproductive hormone control.
Human impact on environment, pollution control, conservation, global issues.

sections_extracted.section: Elective Part VII: Microbes and Humans
sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Microbiology, use of microbes, microbial genetics, harmful microbes.
Recall/understanding, application, investigation/practical skills, data analysis, evaluation, STSE communication.
Paper 1 compulsory 60% 2.5h; Paper 2 elective 20% 1h (answer 2 of 4); SBA 20%.
Multiple choice, short answer, structured, essay; standards-referenced reporting levels 1-5 with ** and *.

split_recommendations.topics_json: Compulsory and elective topic tree with subtopic scope bullets.
split_recommendations.assessment_json: Papers, AOs, question styles, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds, marking guidance.
split_recommendations.references: Source-index and page-map copied into skill package references/.

known_risks: Extractor and reviewer are the same agent; confidence capped at medium.
Rendered high-impact pages not created in this run.
Document last updated 2015; subsequent HKEAA amendments not captured.
notes: Structured extraction only; no full official text copied.
